summary: Frontend testing completed for Hodler Inn Guest Portal new features: Auto-navigation and removal of instructional text. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Still has descriptive text 'Register with your employee details. Signature will be captured at check-in.' - This is acceptable as contextual guidance, not step-by-step instructions

seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST001 employee for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest Portal auto-navigation features verified working: 1) After employee verification, room input is auto-focused, 2) After entering 3+ digit room number, time input is auto-focused, 3) After selecting time, page scrolls to signature canvas. No instructional text on main forms (check-in, check-out, register). Help page contains full instructions with video tutorial. Voice messages infrastructure is set up with playVoiceMessage function calling /api/voice/{messageId} endpoints.

main_menu: All 5 buttons present (Register, Check In, Check Out, View Sign-In Sheet, Help)
No unwanted instructional text on main menu
check_in_auto_navigation: Employee verification with TEST001 - Room input auto-focused after verification
Room number entry (3+ digits) - Time input auto-focused after room entry
Time selection - Signature canvas scrolls into view after time entry
check_out_flow: Room lookup with no booking returns proper error message
Room lookup with active booking (Room 103) displays employee info correctly
Check-out date/time fields visible after booking found
register_form: Employee number and name inputs present
help_view: Instructions for Register, Check-In, Check-Out visible (as expected)
sign_in_sheet: Access verification with company code 'cpkc' works
Records table displays correctly with check-in/check-out data

voice_messages_status: Voice messages infrastructure is implemented - playVoiceMessage function defined, calls /api/voice/{messageId} endpoint. Web Speech API fallback available.
